Tier-1 Off-Grid
Legal / Terms

Terms of Use

July 2026

The Short Version

This is a training and reference tool. It does not replace professional instruction. You are responsible for your own actions. Use it lawfully. Don't steal our content.

Acceptance

By downloading or using the Tier 1 Dark 30 app, or by accessing tier1offgrid.com, you agree to these terms. If you don't agree, don't use the app or the site.

The App Is a Training Tool

Tier 1 Dark 30 is designed to support preparedness education and field reference. Content within the app — including navigation methods, medical reference, land navigation protocols, and gear checklists — is for training and informational purposes only.

It does not replace:

  • Formal first aid or wilderness medicine training
  • Certified firearms or tactical instruction
  • Professional medical advice
  • Legal counsel

Train with qualified instructors. Practice before you need it. The app reinforces skills — it does not build them from scratch.

You Are Responsible for Your Own Actions

Everything you do with information from this app or this site is your responsibility. Tier-1 Off-Grid is not liable for outcomes arising from decisions you make based on content in the app or on the site. Know your local laws. Follow them. Common sense applies.

One-Time Purchase

Premium features are unlocked via a one-time in-app purchase. There is no subscription. Once purchased, the features are yours. All transactions are processed by Apple (App Store) or Google (Play Store) and are subject to their refund policies.

No Warranties

The app and site are provided as-is. We make no guarantees about availability, accuracy of information, or fitness for any particular purpose. Use your judgment. Always have a backup plan.

Intellectual Property

All content on tier1offgrid.com and within the Tier 1 Dark 30 app — including text, graphics, protocols, checklists, and design — is the property of Tier-1 Off-Grid. You may not reproduce, resell, or redistribute it without written permission.

Sharing a link? Go for it. Copying and reposting our content as your own? That's theft. Don't do it.

Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of the State of California, without regard to conflict of law provisions.

Contact

Questions: tier1offgrid@protonmail.com
